name: Micro Machines
description: Micro Machines is a top-down racing game featuring miniature vehicles navigating environments constructed from everyday household objects and locations. Players control these miniature cars, boats, tanks, and helicopters, racing against each other or AI opponents. The environments are integral to the gameplay, providing obstacles, ramps, and hazards based on their real-world counterparts. For example, a breakfast table becomes a treacherous circuit with cereal boxes, spilled milk, and cutlery acting as barriers. The tracks twist and turn around these objects, demanding skillful maneuvering and strategic use of the environment to gain an advantage. The game emphasizes tight controls and arcade-style physics, prioritizing fun and accessibility over realistic simulation. Weapon pickups scattered around the track allow players to temporarily hinder their opponents, adding a layer of chaotic combat to the races. The core gameplay loop revolves around short, fast-paced races where precision driving and opportunistic use of power-ups determine the victor. Multiple vehicle types, each with unique handling characteristics, add depth to the gameplay experience.

controls.shift: Drift / Powerslide (provides a temporary boost after the drift)
